attachments.text: To transfer Pegasus Mail to Office 365, the MacSonik IMAP Backup Tool provides a reliable and user-friendly solution. The tool connects to Pegasus Mail through IMAP, allowing users to access and select mailbox folders for migration. After signing in to Office 365, the tool performs a direct server-to-server transfer without the need for manual file conversion. It maintains data integrity by keepin…
